summary: Software Engineer with expertise in AI/ML, full-stack development, and competitive programming. Experienced in building production-grade ML systems, Agentic AI, and scalable applications. Solved 700+ coding problems across competitive platforms with top rankings.

bullets: Implemented email notification system for registered team members by adding template conditionals and SMTP integration, followed by email scheduling infrastructure with Celery Beat integration.

Unified email handling into single canonical field across 4 modules, eliminating duplication and improving data integrity. Centralized email Reply-To logic by creating unified helper function with SMTP context.
Built conditional field system with client/server logic, enabling dynamic form behavior based on parent question values reducing form complexity by 40%.
Redesigned order form UI affecting 100% of ticket checkout flows, fixed 3 critical data persistence bugs.
Fixed API parameter mismatch causing 100% preview failures in Message Center through parameter naming.
Built ML-driven Green Points engine using FastAPI & Random Forest for real-time reward prediction.
Automated e-waste pricing via multi-feature regression and achieved accuracy of R² = 0.85+.
Integrated AI microservice into a Node.js stack with JWT-secured wallet transactions.

projects.title: EKIA: Code Debugging Intelligence Assistant
projects.description: Built a 5-node LangGraph agent pipeline with hybrid retrieval by FAISS vector search & Neo4j GraphRAG, enabling context-aware error analysis. Integrated local Llama3 via Ollama with HuggingFace embeddings and Langfuse tracing.
highlights: 5-node LangGraph agent pipeline for complex debugging
Hybrid retrieval with FAISS and Neo4j GraphRAG

projects.title: Refine: AI-Powered Resume Optimizer
projects.description: Built resume optimizer raising ATS scores by 45% via prompt-engineered analysis, semantic score, & JD alignment. Implemented JWT + Argon2 auth with RBAC, live LaTeX preview, & user profiles.
highlights: Increased ATS scores by 45% via prompt engineering

projects.title: FinMate: Smart UPI-Based Expense Assistant
projects.description: Built an SMS-based UPI parser with 92%+ accuracy for extracting amount, merchant, and UPI ID. Added SQLite-backed transaction CRUD and Zustand state management with modular UI.

projects.title: Apta: Smart Lifestyle & Learning Recommender
projects.description: Built TF-IDF vectorization + cosine similarity to get accurate recommendation over 150 lifestyle items. Created time/interest-based filtering, reducing irrelevant suggestions by 70%.
